reviews.comment:
Excelente para tomar una pausa en el viaje. Tiene un gran parque de acceso gratuito con mesas y bancos.  Los baños impecables, se olía la lavandina; las canillas son automáticas y el secador de manos es por aire.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent for taking a break during your trip. It has a large, free-access park with tables and benches. The restrooms were spotless, though you could smell the bleach; the faucets are automatic, and the hand dryer is air-based.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTdmI2cVZREAE

reviews.comment:
La dos empleadas del servicompras muy poco eficientes... Tenían dificultades para vender. Me cobraron las medialunas que les pedí y me dieron muchas menos ¡Menos mal que corrobore! Encima cuando fui a pedirles las facturas que faltaban me recibieron a la defensiva y, para variar, me quería cobrar de más.
El resto todo okay... Tiene un espacio enorme para almorzar o desayunar de pasada y admiten mascotas para que puedan hacer sus necesidades.

(Translated by Google)
The two employees at the convenience store were very inefficient... They had trouble making sales. They charged me for the croissants I ordered but gave me far fewer! Luckily I double-checked! On top of that, when I went to ask for the missing receipts, they were defensive and, as usual, tried to overcharge me.

Everything else was fine... They have a huge space for lunch or a quick breakfast, and they allow pets to relieve themselves.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTdmFhS3lnRRAB
